rows.title: External temp-data backup pipeline (outside git)
rows.problem: Preserve high-churn runtime/state data without repo noise
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/state_backup.js` + `config/state_backup_policy.json`, optional daily spine hook (`STATE_BACKUP_ENABLED=1`), retention policy encoded

rows.title: Skill quarantine enforcement in all install paths
rows.problem: Prevent unreviewed skill install bypasses
rows.acceptance: Strict enforcer scans `systems/`, `habits/`, `skills/`, and `memory/tools/` (tests excluded), blocks direct installer patterns (shell + spawn/exec forms), and requires wrapper + quarantine structure to pass

rows.title: Autonomy receipt dashboard/summary
rows.problem: Make pass/fail verification visible without raw log digging
rows.acceptance: Daily summary command/report shows receipt pass rate + top failure reasons

rows.title: AGI security/governance hardening pack
rows.problem: Prevent capability-overhang failures as model capability increases
rows.acceptance: Dual-control approval for strategy mode escalation + non-bypass budget/risk caps + immutable policy/kernel verification + one-command emergency stop path tested

rows.title: Autonomous skill-add with necessity justification gate
rows.problem: Allow Protheus to add skills safely only when operationally justified
rows.acceptance: `install_skill_safe.js` enforces necessity scoring for `--autonomous=1` installs using policy-defined structured justification (`problem`, `repeat_frequency`, `expected_time_or_token_savings`, `risk_class`, `why_existing_habits_or_skills_insufficient`); novelty-only reasons are blocked with receipts

rows.title: Strategic alignment oracle (weekly)
rows.problem: Keep unattended autonomy optimizing for T1 outcomes instead of infrastructure churn
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/alignment_oracle.js` writes weekly `alignment_score` artifacts (`state/autonomy/alignment_oracle/`), links to proposal/receipt evidence, emits deduped `autonomy_human_escalation` rows on low-streak escalation, and is executed by spine via `SPINE_ALIGNMENT_ORACLE_ENABLED`

rows.title: Exception novelty classifier + recovery policy
rows.problem: Prevent retry spirals and route genuinely new failures to human review quickly
rows.acceptance: Classifier stores signature memory and now applies deterministic recovery decisions from `config/autonomy_exception_recovery_policy.json`; autonomy exception telemetry includes action/cooldown/playbook fields, and novel signatures route to escalation policy

rows.title: Global cost governor + autopause guardrails
rows.problem: Enforce hard resource boundaries across autonomy/reflex/focus/dream paths
rows.acceptance: Unified daily/monthly budget policies apply to all adaptive executors, burn-rate spike and low-credit thresholds trigger automatic pause/degrade actions, and every block/allow decision is audit-logged with reason

rows.title: Dream-to-upstream signal bridge
rows.problem: Ensure dream outputs influence proposal/admission/ranking instead of remaining passive artifacts
rows.acceptance: Proposal enrichment/autonomy ranking ingest dream tokens/themes (bounded influence + audit fields), and runs emit measurable dream-hit attribution in proposal metadata

rows.title: Adaptive dream-model failover + cooldown memory
rows.problem: Prevent repeated `smallthinker` timeout loops and keep dream cycle resilient
rows.acceptance: Idle/REM model selection records per-model timeout/error history, applies cooldown/backoff, auto-fails over to alternate local models, and logs fallback reasons deterministically

rows.title: Policy for tracked vs ignored state streams
rows.problem: Keep audit logs intentional and reduce accidental tracking drift
rows.acceptance: One doc defines tracked state classes and `.gitignore` alignment

rows.title: Habit promotion quality hardening
rows.problem: Prevent no-op scaffolds from promoting without real value
rows.acceptance: Promotion checks include measured savings/effect threshold

rows.title: Automated stale-state cleanup helper
rows.problem: Reduce local churn from old generated artifacts
rows.acceptance: Non-destructive cleanup command with dry-run and allowlist

rows.title: Hardware-aware local model planner
rows.problem: Keep local routing aligned with actual machine capacity
rows.acceptance: Router can detect CPU/RAM/VRAM class, recommend/update eligible local models, and log changes before activation

rows.title: Model variant profiles (`:thinking` and base)
rows.problem: Use reasoning variants only when justified to control cost/latency
rows.acceptance: Routing policy defines when to use thinking variants, with auto-return to anchor model and measurable quality gain

rows.title: Swarm verification mode for deep-thinker
rows.problem: Multi-agent cross-check for high-stakes reasoning once swarm capability exists
rows.acceptance: Deep-thinker can run parallel model checks with quorum/consensus policy and bounded token budget

rows.title: Strategy profile layer + architecture genericity guard
rows.problem: Keep specialization out of `systems/` while enabling adaptive policy
rows.acceptance: `config/strategies/` active profile loaded by autonomy gates; architecture guard available in audit/strict modes; initial rollout uses `execution_policy.mode=score_only`

rows.title: Phased TypeScript migration for `systems/` + `lib/`
rows.problem: Reduce contract drift and runtime breakage in high-permanence layers without rewriting architecture
rows.acceptance: `systems/` + `lib/` are TS-owned with wrapper-only JS (`lib/ts_bootstrap.js`), `npm run typecheck:systems` is green, and `node systems/ops/dist_runtime_cutover.js legacy-pairs --strict=1` reports zero legacy pairs

rows.title: Optional reflex sub-layer under habits (fast micro-routines)
rows.problem: Improve adaptation latency for frequent tiny tasks without promoting permanent system changes
rows.acceptance: Add `habits/reflexes/` runtime path and tiny-model executor; reflex generation/degradation mirrors habit promotion/decay rules; router can prefer reflex before habit when confidence and latency budget are met

rows.title: Cross-device active-state continuity layer
rows.problem: Preserve in-flight autonomy/routing context when switching active shell/device without split-brain
rows.acceptance: Add `systems/continuity/` with lease-based active writer election, checkpoint + delta replay state transfer, takeover on lease expiry, and secret-safe payload policy (no raw creds in continuity artifacts)

rows.title: Proposal admission + queue hygiene hardening
rows.problem: Reduce duplicate/stub/unknown-eye noise before autonomy selection
rows.acceptance: `sensory_queue` dedupes by `proposal_id`, static gate filters stub/unknown-eye eye-attributed proposals, lifecycle status normalized (`filtered` instead of `unknown`), and tests cover quality + dedupe behavior

rows.title: Optional habit cell-pool executor (parallelized by demand + hardware caps)
rows.problem: Extend reflex-style dynamic concurrency to habit execution only if measured ROI justifies complexity
rows.acceptance: Add bounded habit worker pool with hysteresis/cooldowns, per-habit safety gates, and rollback-safe default-off rollout

rows.title: Ignore memory snapshots after backup channels are verified
rows.problem: Keep repo clean once adaptive/normal memory have reliable off-repo backup/restore
rows.acceptance: Define backup integrity checks for memory snapshots, then add scoped `.gitignore` rules for backup-only memory artifacts without ignoring source/config/governance files

rows.title: End-to-end pipeline integration tests (`eyes -> insight -> queue -> execute -> receipt -> score`)
rows.problem: Catch regressions that unit tests miss in autonomous flow handoffs
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic E2E handoff test covering generated + filtered proposals, actuation bridge wiring, dry-run execution, and contract receipt assertions (`memory/tools/tests/pipeline_handoffs.integration.test.js`)

rows.title: Two-phase autonomous change execution with automatic rollback
rows.problem: Prevent partial/bad self-changes from persisting
rows.acceptance: Added `improvement_controller.js start-validated` implementing deterministic `plan -> apply(commit-on-head) -> verify(core checks) -> commit(trial start)` flow; failed verify triggers optional auto-revert and writes contract receipts with root cause (`state/autonomy/improvements/phase_receipts/`)

rows.title: Unified global budget governor across reflex/autonomy/focus/dream/spawn
rows.problem: Prevent resource contention and runaway loops under concurrent adaptive workloads
rows.acceptance: Spawn token budgeting now shares global `system_budget` state/events path by default, autonomy reads same global state dir, focus controller enforces per-run budget gating + writes allow/degrade/deny decisions, and all contention decisions are auditable in centralized budget events

rows.title: Event/state schema versioning + validators + migrations
rows.problem: Eliminate silent JSON/JSONL contract drift over time
rows.acceptance: All persisted contracts carry `schema_version`; reads validate; controlled migrations exist for version bumps

rows.title: Outcome-linked routing learning by task type
rows.problem: Improve model selection quality beyond availability/latency signals
rows.acceptance: Router maintains `task_type x model` success matrix and uses it in ranking/escalation decisions with measurable uplift

rows.title: Ops visibility dashboard + SLO alerts for autonomy health
rows.problem: Make drift/stalls visible before they degrade autonomy quality
rows.acceptance: Daily/weekly report includes dark-eye, proposal starvation, loop stall, and drift SLOs with thresholded alerts

rows.title: Execution-worthiness scoring at queue admission
rows.problem: Prioritize proposals that are concrete and executable, not meta-coordination noise
rows.acceptance: Queue admission computes deterministic execution-worthiness score (objective clarity, command concreteness, verification strength, rollback quality) and blocks low-scoring proposals with explicit reasons

rows.title: Outcome calibration by proposal type (post BL-027 companion)
rows.problem: Track pass-rate by proposal type and tune admission thresholds using per-type shipped/no-change outcomes
rows.acceptance: `outcome_fitness_loop` now emits bounded per-type threshold offsets (`strategy_policy.proposal_type_threshold_offsets`) plus per-type audit reasoning, writes calibration receipts on offset changes (`state/adaptive/strategy/receipts.jsonl`), and proposal admission/gating consume offsets via shared outcome-fitness policy helpers

rows.title: Weekly strategy synthesis from executed outcomes
rows.problem: Ensure strategy layer learns from realized outcomes instead of raw proposal volume
rows.acceptance: Scheduled synthesis summarizes executed proposals, winners/losers, and recommended strategy weight updates with deterministic trace to receipts

rows.title: Secret broker isolation + scoped credential handles
rows.problem: Prevent high-capability models from directly reading raw secrets from disk during autonomous changes
rows.acceptance: Added `lib/secret_broker.js` + `systems/security/secret_broker.js`; autonomous Moltbook flows issue/resolve time-scoped handles; credential reads centralized in broker and audited to `state/security/secret_broker_audit.jsonl`

rows.title: Network egress choke point for autonomous actions
rows.problem: Reduce exfiltration/abuse blast radius by forcing all outbound actions through a policy gate
rows.acceptance: Added `lib/egress_gateway.js` + `systems/security/egress_gateway.js` with `config/egress_gateway_policy.json`; sensory collectors/focus and Moltbook API/guard route outbound HTTP through gateway with allowlists, rate caps, and decision audits in `state/security/egress_audit.jsonl`

rows.title: Signed startup attestation + integrity check at run boot
rows.problem: Detect tampering before autonomy loops execute
rows.acceptance: Boot path emits signed attestation over critical policy/config hashes; autonomy refuses execute/canary when attestation fails or is stale

rows.title: Quorum validator for high-tier self-modification proposals
rows.problem: Add independent cross-check before risky self-edits are applied
rows.acceptance: High-tier mutation proposals require deterministic second-pass validator agreement before admission; disagreement blocks with explainable receipt

rows.title: Operator runbook for incidents + rollback drills
rows.problem: Reduce time-to-recover and remove tribal-knowledge dependency during failures
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with top incident classes (routing degraded, schema drift, sensory starvation, autonomy stall), deterministic remediation, rollback drill, and verification artifacts

rows.title: Required-Checks branch protection policy
rows.problem: Prevent contract/security regressions from merging without gates
rows.acceptance: Implemented `.github/CODEOWNERS`, `.github/workflows/required-checks.yml`, `docs/BRANCH_PROTECTION_POLICY.md`, and local `npm run guard:merge` gates requiring `test:ci`, `contract_check`, `schema_contract_check`, and adaptive guard strict checks

rows.title: Batch execution lane for low-urgency LLM work
rows.problem: Capture major token-cost reductions on deferable workloads without hurting latency-critical tasks
rows.acceptance: Add queueable batch adapter path for low-urgency tasks with deterministic SLA/expiry rules, per-task receipts, and measured token-cost delta vs non-batch baseline

rows.title: Prompt/result cache with TTL + invalidation policy
rows.problem: Reduce repeated LLM spend on near-identical requests while preserving correctness
rows.acceptance: `systems/routing/llm_gateway.js` now stores prompt/result cache entries with TTL + LRU pruning in `state/routing/prompt_result_cache`, supports source fingerprint + bust key invalidation hooks, and emits cache-hit/miss telemetry in gateway audit logs

rows.title: Parallel eyes execution with budget-aware concurrency
rows.problem: Improve sensory throughput without budget/network spikes
rows.acceptance: `habits/scripts/external_eyes.js` now supports bounded parallel eye runs (`EYES_PARALLEL_ENABLED`, `EYES_MAX_PARALLEL`), automatically contracts concurrency under budget pressure from system budget state, and logs active parallel mode/caps during run cycles

rows.title: Backup integrity checks
rows.problem: Catch silent backup corruption
rows.acceptance: Scheduled hash verification and alert on mismatch

rows.title: Repo hygiene CI check for generated artifacts
rows.problem: Prevent noisy files slipping into PRs
rows.acceptance: CI fails if generated paths are staged unexpectedly

rows.title: Full-pipeline integration/e2e hardening
rows.problem: Current tests cover slices; unattended autonomy needs deterministic coverage across all major handoffs
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic full handoff integration with explicit failure-path coverage (`memory/tools/tests/pipeline_handoffs.integration.test.js`) validating timeout/rate-limit/rollback-style failures propagate into actuation receipts + `receipt_summary` failure taxonomy, alongside existing sensory/autonomy e2e tests in CI

rows.title: Release-gate + canary/rollback enforcement expansion
rows.problem: Existing checks exist but canary/rollback discipline must be mandatory for self-change and high-risk lanes
rows.acceptance: `improvement_controller start-validated` now requires policy-root authorization (lease + approval note) before self-change trial start, and medium-risk executable proposals are blocked when rollback path signals are missing (`medium_risk_missing_rollback_path`)

rows.title: Observability + SLO + runbook completion pass
rows.problem: Metrics/runbooks exist but unattended mode needs complete coverage with actionable alerts
rows.acceptance: Added explicit `verification_pass_rate` health SLO gate in `health_status`, enforced SLO->runbook coverage via `config/autonomy_slo_runbook_map.json` + `slo_runbook_check`, and added `Incident 8: Verification Pass-Rate Regression` procedures in `docs/OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md` with regression tests

rows.title: Threat-model-driven security test pack
rows.problem: Governance controls need explicit abuse-path validation before long unattended windows
rows.acceptance: `docs/THREAT_MODEL_V1.md` now defines prioritized abuse paths and `memory/tools/tests/security_threat_pack.test.js` enforces deterministic regression tests for prompt-injection ingress, unauthorized mutation, egress bypass, secret isolation/exfiltration, policy-root lease misuse, and integrity tamper paths

rows.title: Contract/version governance closure across adaptive boundaries
rows.problem: Schema/versioning exists, but cross-layer drift checks must be exhaustive to prevent silent corruption
rows.acceptance: `schema_contract_check` now enforces adaptive store `expected_version` pinning per store contract (eyes/focus/habits/reflex/strategy), and CI fails closed on version drift

rows.title: Baseline adaptive-mutation safety kernel
rows.problem: Any topology/self-improvement expansion requires hard guardrails before promotion
rows.acceptance: Enforce mutation budget cap + TTL + quarantine + veto window + rollback receipt for all adaptive topology proposals, and fail closed when safety attestations are missing

rows.title: Baseline objective value-currency propagation
rows.problem: Keep autonomy aligned to objective-specific success definitions during unattended runs
rows.acceptance: Propagate directive-derived value currency into admission + queue ranking baseline paths, with deterministic audit fields and no regression to drift/safety SLOs

rows.title: Read-only recursive introspection baseline
rows.problem: Operator/system visibility into branch pressure and state is required before aggressive restructuring
rows.acceptance: Emit machine-readable branch health snapshot (workers, leases, queues, cooldowns, policy holds) and wire it into health/ops reporting without any auto-restructure actions yet

rows.title: Full repo TypeScript conversion (`.js` -> `.ts`)
rows.problem: Improve long-term maintainability and refactor safety once V1 critical-path typing is stable
rows.acceptance: Core runtime is TS-owned end-to-end (`systems/` + `lib/`), dist-runtime `legacy-pairs --strict=1` is green, and the only non-wrapper JS holdout is `lib/ts_bootstrap.js` by design

rows.title: Explore polyglot service modules behind strict contracts
rows.problem: Enable targeted non-TS modules only where ROI is proven (ecosystem/security/hot path) without creating architecture drift
rows.acceptance: Implemented strict contract pilot via `systems/polyglot/polyglot_service_adapter.ts` + `systems/polyglot/pilot_task_classifier.py`, policy in `config/polyglot_service_policy.json`, contract doc in `docs/POLYGLOT_MODULE_CONTRACT.md`, and coverage in `memory/tools/tests/polyglot_service_adapter.test.js`

rows.title: Dist runtime cutover + legacy paired JS retirement
rows.problem: Remove long-term TS/JS dual-maintenance cost without breaking runtime contracts
rows.acceptance: Dist runtime mode + cutover controller landed (`lib/ts_bootstrap.js`, `systems/ops/dist_runtime_cutover.ts`, `docs/DIST_RUNTIME_CUTOVER.md`), `verify` now enforces `legacy_runtime_js_pairs` via `legacy-pairs`, final non-wrapper twin retired (`systems/fractal/regime_organ.js` wrapper-only), and regression test coverage is green

rows.title: Task-type outcome learning upgrade
rows.problem: Improve model/tool routing quality using empirical task success patterns
rows.acceptance: Routing/ranking consume task-type capability outcomes with tested fallback adjustments in `systems/routing/model_router.ts` + `memory/tools/tests/model_router_routing_features.test.js`

rows.title: Self-experimentation framework with promotion gates
rows.problem: Let system improve methods safely via evidence-based trials
rows.acceptance: Evidence-gated experimentation + promotion workflow is enforced by `systems/autonomy/lever_experiment_gate.ts` and `systems/autonomy/improvement_controller.ts` with rollback-aware receipts/tests

rows.title: Global capability switchboard (security-locked)
rows.problem: Allow rapid feature/capability deactivation under drift or threat without allowing model-driven disablement of security controls
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/security/capability_switchboard.ts` with signed policy-root gate, dual-control toggles, non-deactivatable security lanes, and immutable audit history (`config/capability_switchboard_policy.json`)

rows.title: Exterior anti-sabotage shield + instant auto-reset
rows.problem: Prevent rogue external AI or out-of-channel mutations from silently corrupting system behavior
rows.acceptance: Snapshot/verify/auto-reset + quarantine path implemented in `systems/security/anti_sabotage_shield.ts`, plus realtime `watch` loop with policy defaults/state tracking, strict-fail-on-unrecovered behavior, npm scripts, and regression coverage (`memory/tools/tests/anti_sabotage_shield*.test.js`)

rows.title: Chaos testing program (adaptive + orchestration lanes)
rows.problem: Stress resilience under controlled failures once V1 hardening is stable
rows.acceptance: Scenario-driven chaos receipts + strict recovery checks shipped in `systems/ops/chaos_program.ts` with policy + tests

rows.title: Scale/performance benchmarking harness
rows.problem: Quantify headroom and bottlenecks before broader deployment
rows.acceptance: Reproducible throughput/latency/error/token-efficiency harness is live in `systems/ops/scale_benchmark.ts` with strict thresholds and historical reports

rows.title: External security assessment and pen-test cycle (canonical blocker)
rows.problem: Independent validation reduces blind spots in internal security assumptions
rows.acceptance: Internal intake/closure tracking is ready (`systems/security/external_security_cycle.ts`), but completion is blocked on third-party assessor execution + signed external report delivery

rows.title: Compliance/reporting automation (optional enterprise track)
rows.problem: Enterprise deployment often requires auditable policy/report workflows
rows.acceptance: Governance evidence index + SOC2 readiness report automation is implemented in `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` and `config/compliance_controls_map.json`

rows.title: Multi-team/multi-environment release governance
rows.problem: Support organization-scale ownership without destabilizing autonomy
rows.acceptance: Dev/stage/prod promotion governance with owner boundaries + dual-approval protections is enforced by `systems/ops/environment_promotion_gate.ts`

rows.title: Adaptive LLM seed -> specialist training (hardware-aware)
rows.problem: Build long-term AI sovereignty so each deployment can reduce external model dependence with user-specific specialization
rows.acceptance: Curation/planning/eval/promotion workflow with hardware profiles and gating is implemented in `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` + `config/nursery_training_policy.json`

rows.title: Dynamic optimization floor by objective criticality
rows.problem: Prevent endless low-impact self-tuning while allowing tighter thresholds for accuracy-critical domains
rows.acceptance: Criticality-aware optimization floor decisions + `good_enough` receipts shipped in `systems/autonomy/objective_optimization_floor.ts`

rows.title: Optimization aperture sensing controller (risk-adaptive)
rows.problem: Automatically adjust how aggressively the system pursues optimization based on sensed risk profile of active work
rows.acceptance: Risk/impact/budget/safety-driven aperture controller now emits lane recommendations + receipts via `systems/autonomy/optimization_aperture_controller.ts`

rows.title: Ternary belief reasoning engine for spine state modeling
rows.problem: Representation efficiency: balanced ternary {-1, 0, +1} maps directly to {pain, unknown, ok} states with cleaner consensus/propagation logic than binary
rows.acceptance: `lib/trit.ts` + `lib/ternary_belief_engine.ts` are integrated into spine state modeling (`systems/spine/spine.ts`) with dedicated tests and daily telemetry

rows.title: SOC2 Type I readiness pack (control mapping + evidence index)
rows.problem: Close the architecture-to-enterprise gap without full compliance overhead too early
rows.acceptance: SOC2 mapping + readiness generation is wired through `systems/ops/compliance_reports.ts` with control map `config/compliance_controls_map.json` and evidence index outputs

rows.title: Disaster recovery game-days + RTO/RPO validation
rows.problem: Prove operational resilience, not just design intent
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/dr_gameday.ts` now emits cadence-aware DR receipts (`run/list/status`) with retention controls, and `systems/ops/dr_gameday_gate.ts` enforces rolling pass-rate + RTO/RPO regression thresholds for release gating with immutable gate receipts

rows.title: Incident postmortem learning loop (blameless + enforceable actions)
rows.problem: Turn failures into compounding operational maturity
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/postmortem_loop.ts` now auto-creates incident templates, tracks corrective/preventive actions with owners/dates, and blocks closure until preventive checks are linked, verified passing, and resolved

rows.title: Maintainer handoff pack + bus-factor guardrails
rows.problem: Reduce single-operator risk and improve team legibility at handoff
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/handoff_pack.ts` now builds deterministic handoff packs (docs + architecture map + ownership matrix) and runs SLA-bounded simulation receipts over critical operator commands

rows.title: Comprehensive documentation system (docs-as-code + coverage gates)
rows.problem: Make system legible and maintainable by external teams without tribal knowledge
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/docs_coverage_gate.ts` now enforces critical-path docs mapping + broken local link checks, with policy in `config/docs_coverage_map.json`, merge guard integration, and required-checks workflow jobs

rows.title: Autonomous skill generation pipeline (guarded)
rows.problem: Enable Protheus to generate new reusable skills from repeated successful patterns, not just install existing ones
rows.acceptance: Guarded pattern->candidate->sandbox->ROI gate->publish pipeline is implemented in `systems/autonomy/skill_generation_pipeline.ts` with policy + tests and novelty-only blocking

rows.title: Fractal morph planner (directive-conditioned topology)
rows.problem: Enable sports-car style adaptation where structure changes with objective context instead of static loops
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/morph_planner.ts` emits bounded `prune/spawn/rewire` proposal-only plans with governance-required flags, writes daily receipts, and is executed by spine (`spine_fractal_morph_plan`)

rows.title: Genome topology ledger + mutation journal
rows.problem: Give the organism a compact, versioned blueprint that can evolve safely over time
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/genome_ledger.ts` writes schema-versioned snapshots + hash-linked mutation journal rows with verify command, and spine appends daily genome snapshots (`spine_fractal_genome_snapshot`)

rows.title: Evolution arena (spawn-broker A/B variant trials)
rows.problem: Select adaptations by measured value gain rather than intuition and avoid destabilizing mainline behavior
rows.acceptance: Bounded variant arena with objective scoring + winner/loser receipts is implemented in `systems/fractal/evolution_arena.ts`

rows.title: Full adaptive mutation safety kernel expansion
rows.problem: Expand the V1 baseline guardrails into full topology/genome evolution containment
rows.acceptance: Branch risk scoring + mutation-rate caps + staged promotion bands + high-risk approval controls landed in `systems/autonomy/mutation_safety_kernel.ts` and are enforced by `systems/autonomy/proposal_enricher.ts`

rows.title: Full directive-to-system value currency propagation
rows.problem: Let each objective define its own success currency (revenue, delivery, quality, etc.) while preserving strong money prioritization when applicable
rows.acceptance: Outcome-fitness now feeds currency-policy overlays and calibration receipts (`systems/autonomy/outcome_fitness_loop.ts`, `lib/outcome_fitness.ts`, `lib/strategy_resolver.ts`) so value-currency adaptation closes the loop

rows.title: Full recursive organism introspection map
rows.problem: Close the self-awareness gap by letting the system inspect branch-level function, pressure, and decay internally
rows.acceptance: `systems/fractal/introspection_map.ts` now emits branch health graph + anomaly-driven restructuring candidates with reversible references; spine runs it daily (`spine_fractal_introspection`)

rows.title: System black-box hash ledger (EU compliance fallback)
rows.problem: Anticipate EU compliance/audit pressure with tamper-evident decision traceability while minimizing sensitive payload retention
rows.acceptance: `systems/security/black_box_ledger.ts` now generates append-only chain + per-rollup hashed detail ledgers with verify/status commands (legacy-compatible), and spine rolls up daily (`spine_black_box_ledger`)

rows.title: Dream consolidation gate (bounded sleep cycle)
rows.problem: Compress experience into actionable pattern memory without live-loop instability
rows.acceptance: Implemented in `systems/fractal/organism_cycle.ts` as bounded `dream_consolidation` output (proposal-only, no direct actuation) executed by spine (`spine_fractal_organism_cycle`)

rows.title: Epigenetic regulation tags
rows.problem: Add reversible fast adaptation without direct code mutation
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now updates TTL-bound epigenetic tags in `state/autonomy/fractal/epigenetic_tags.json` using trit-shaped signals and auditable reasons

rows.title: Signed pheromone signaling lane
rows.problem: Reduce spine bottleneck for local coordination while preserving trust boundaries
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now emits signed local pheromone packets with TTL into `state/autonomy/fractal/pheromones/YYYY-MM-DD.json`

rows.title: Resonance/harmony score controller
rows.problem: Detect high-consensus subsystem alignment and exploit it safely
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now computes bounded harmony score and exposes it to summary/cockpit telemetry (`summary.fractal.harmony_score`)

rows.title: Collective archetype pool
rows.problem: Build reusable cross-objective pattern memory with provenance
rows.acceptance: `organism_cycle` now maintains versioned archetype pool (`state/autonomy/fractal/archetype_pool.json`) with confidence/decay metadata and provenance text

rows.title: Observer/Mirror read-only narration layer
rows.problem: Add externalized introspection so operators get deterministic situational summaries instead of raw log spelunking
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/observer_mirror.ts` emits daily mood/statement/recommendation snapshots under `state/autonomy/observer_mirror/` and spine runs it as `spine_observer_mirror`

rows.title: Collective Shadow ranking lane
rows.problem: Convert non-yield + red-team outcomes into bounded avoid/reinforce archetypes that influence ranking without direct actuation
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/collective_shadow.ts` writes `latest.json` archetypes and `autonomy_controller` applies capped penalty/bonus via `candidateCollectiveShadowSignal`

rows.title: Nursery promotion hardening (lineage + cooldown + evidence floor)
rows.problem: Prevent fragile or untraceable specialist checkpoint promotion
rows.acceptance: `systems/nursery/specialist_training.ts` now enforces eval/data minimums, optional drift/regression caps, checkpoint lineage, cooldown windows, and promotion manifests in `state/nursery/training/promotions/`

rows.title: Orchestron emergence hardening pass (candidate risk + trit gates + lineage metadata + richer birth telemetry)
rows.problem: Tighten adaptive workflow safety and observability while preserving generation diversity
rows.acceptance: Candidate-level red-team pressure now influences nursery scoring (`candidate_red_team_pressure`, `red_team_penalty`), auto-apply adds trit floor gates (`min_avg_trit_alignment`, `min_min_trit_alignment`), applied child workflows persist lineage state (`lineage` + `fractal_state`), and birth events now emit `candidate_indexed` + `graft_planned` stages

rows.title: Per-candidate adversarial simulation lane (sandboxed micro red-team)
rows.problem: Replace heuristic candidate risk pressure with direct adversarial evidence before promotion
rows.acceptance: `systems/workflow/orchestron/adversarial_lane.ts` now runs per-candidate probes (critical/non-critical findings + replay artifacts), `nursery_tester` consumes candidate-level adversarial evidence and blocks by per-candidate thresholds, and orchestron payload/birth telemetry now emit adversarial probe receipts (`adversarial_scored`, `candidate_adversarial`)

rows.title: Daemon Soak Promotion Gate + Receipts (24-48h)

rows.acceptance: Added `soak-gate` lane to `systems/memory/rust_memory_transition_lane.ts` + policy wiring in `config/rust_memory_transition_policy.json` to evaluate 24-48h windows for p99 latency, pass rate, fallback-trigger count, and daemon restart count, with fail-closed strict mode and receipt persistence (`state/memory/rust_transition/soak_promotion_decisions.jsonl`); coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_transition_lane.test.js`.

rows.title: Daemon Supervision + Stale PID/Socket Reaper
rows.problem: Long-lived daemon operation can degrade after crashes/reboots if stale pid/socket state is not cleaned deterministically.
rows.acceptance: Added daemon lifecycle supervisor `systems/memory/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor.{ts,js}` + policy `config/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor_policy.json` (`start/stop/restart/status/healthcheck/reap-stale`) with restart backoff, stale pid/socket reaping, and lifecycle receipts; wired stale PID preflight into `systems/memory/memory_recall.ts` autostart path; added crash-recovery regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_daemon_supervisor.test.js` and refreshed transition contracts/tests.

rows.title: Fallback Retirement Gate (JS Emergency-Only)
rows.problem: Broad JS fallback keeps complexity and latency overhead high and can hide memory-kernel regressions.
rows.acceptance: Added `memory_fallback_retirement_gate` (`systems/memory/memory_fallback_retirement_gate.ts`) with strict policy + emergency one-click toggle, incident receipts on fallback attempts, and `memory_recall` enforcement that blocks JS fallback when retired; regression coverage added for strict-block and emergency-allow flows.

rows.title: Direct Memory Encryption Plane Integration (Replace DB Shim)
rows.problem: Memory-at-rest encryption should use the canonical envelope lane for consistent key-rotation/audit behavior across organs.
rows.acceptance: Rust memory hot-state now persists canonical organ-state envelope JSON (`schema_id: organ_state_envelope`, lane `hot_state`) instead of raw cipher strings, auto-migrates legacy/plain rows on open, rejects non-envelope reads post-migration, and exposes `verify-envelope` runtime verification for receipt generation.

rows.title: In-Process Rust Memory Binding Lane (`napi-rs`)
rows.problem: Daemon/CLI transport is robust but still adds avoidable overhead on hottest memory call sites.
rows.acceptance: Added optional in-process `napi` adapter lane (`systems/memory/rust_napi_binding.ts`) and integrated it into unified transport orchestration (`memory_transport` + `memory_recall`) so query/get attempt N-API first when available, with deterministic daemon/CLI fallback and parity regression tests (including fake-module N-API fixtures).

rows.title: Contract-Coupled Defense Dependency Mesh
rows.problem: Removing defenses should break authorization paths, not create undefined runtime behavior
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/security/skin_protection_layer.ts` contract mesh lane (`state_kernel/proposal_gating/execution_primitive/memory_traversal`) with deterministic reason codes; actuation now evaluates this gate in `systems/actuation/actuation_executor.ts` before execution and blocks fail-closed when containment is active; merge + contract checks now assert lane presence (`systems/security/merge_guard.ts`, `systems/spine/contract_check.ts`).

rows.title: Runtime Tamper Attestation + Self-Containment
rows.problem: Detect live patching/removal attempts and contain safely
rows.acceptance: SKIN runtime attestation now combines integrity kernel + remote heartbeat posture checks (`integrity_policy_path`, heartbeat latest/quarantine alignment), and can transition to deterministic stasis containment state (`state/security/skin_protection/stasis_state.json`) via `verify/enforce` flows with forensic history receipts.

rows.title: Binary Hardening Profile + Anti-RE Telemetry
rows.problem: Raise reverse-engineering cost while preserving maintainability
rows.acceptance: SKIN binary hardening gate validates minimum obfuscation tier + anti-debug false-positive budget against binary receipts/artifacts, emits deterministic audit outputs, and is covered by `memory/tools/tests/skin_protection_layer.test.js` with shadow/enforce posture checks.

rows.title: No Offensive Behavior Invariant
rows.problem: All mechanisms must remain strictly defensive, legal, bounded, auditable, and reversible
rows.acceptance: Enforced in `systems/security/venom_containment_layer.ts` via `defensiveInvariantStatus` + fail-closed checks and policy contract in `config/venom_containment_policy.json` (`offensive_behaviors_forbidden`). Foundation/contract checks now assert this lane.

rows.title: Attractive Full-Capability Facade + Triggered Containment Escalation
rows.problem: The stolen copy appears completely normal and powerful at first, encouraging deeper engagement before containment activates
rows.acceptance: Implemented trust-gated escalation in `evaluateContainment` (`systems/security/venom_containment_layer.ts`) using soul-token + startup-attestation signals; ingress now stamps containment metadata and blocks only when non-shadow enforcement is enabled (`systems/security/request_ingress.ts`).

rows.title: Defensive Decoy Response Layer (Non-Destructive)
rows.problem: Unauthorized sessions receive specially crafted low-value outputs designed to provide no useful IP or training value
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic non-destructive decoys (`generateDecoyResponse`) with watermark lineage, bounded quality tiers, and bounded distillation-resistance overlays (`decoy.distillation_guard`); ingress now enforces decoy-only output mode from configured stage (`enforcement.decoy_from_stage`) in non-shadow runtime (`systems/security/request_ingress.ts`).

rows.title: Bounded Verification Friction Escalation
rows.problem: Unauthorized copies encounter escalating but bounded verification challenges that increase operational cost
rows.acceptance: Stage-specific bounded friction/challenge scores are now runtime-enforced in ingress: bounded delay (`REQUEST_CONTAINMENT_DELAY_MS`) plus proof-of-work challenge gate (`verification_challenge`, `verifyChallengeProof`) in non-shadow mode; still capped by policy bounds (`max_friction_delay_ms`, `max_challenge_score`).

rows.title: Timed Lease Decay + Deterministic Lockout
rows.problem: Stolen copies function normally for a policy-defined period, then gradually lose capabilities in a predictable way
rows.acceptance: Implemented policy-defined stealth lease windows (`timed_lease.stealth_window_hours`) that defer staged hit escalation, followed by deterministic ramp (`tease -> challenge -> degrade -> lockout`) with cooldown lockout timers and session state persistence in `state/security/venom_containment/*`.

rows.title: Self-Reporting Forensic Beacon System
rows.problem: Every unauthorized attempt automatically generates and returns detailed forensic evidence to the root
rows.acceptance: Unauthorized events now emit forensic bundles + JSONL evidence (`forensic_events.jsonl`, evidence dir) and mirror sanitized beacon records to master conduit queue (`master_queue_path`).

rows.title: Adaptive Defense Evolution Engine
rows.problem: The protective mechanisms improve over time based on observed attack patterns
rows.acceptance: Added profile evolution (`evolveProfiles`) from containment telemetry and persisted runtime bias/uplift outputs (`profiles.json`); containment evaluation now consumes evolved runtime bias + redteam adaptive cost profiles to modulate live friction/challenge/decoy intensity before ingress enforcement.

rows.title: Staged Containment Ramp
rows.problem: Apply containment in deterministic stages to minimize false positives while still converging unauthorized copies to unusable state
rows.acceptance: Implemented policy-driven staged ramp thresholds (`staged_ramp`) with bounded tease window before stricter containment and deterministic receipt trail; covered by venom test.

rows.title: Open-Ended Defensive Tool Discovery + Evolution Lane
rows.problem: Predefined defenses age quickly; Red Team should generate novel defensive tools across evolving categories (detection, friction, decoy, verification, containment orchestration, temporal deception, adaptive honeypots, stack-aware pressure profiles) for new threat classes (advanced RE, distillation, hardware probing, supply-chain abuse, etc.)
rows.acceptance: Delivered `systems/redteam/adaptive_defense_expansion.ts` with open-category tool proposal synthesis (`proposeToolsFromIncidents`), category expansion, bounded/legal/reversible metadata, and shadow-first promotion receipts; wired into harness run/status.

rows.title: Adaptive Cost-Escalation Profiles + Runtime Fingerprint Classes
rows.problem: Fixed friction profiles are easier to optimize around; adaptive profiles should tune defense pressure by unauthorized runtime class
rows.acceptance: `updateCostProfiles` now derives stack-adaptive challenge/friction/decoy/rate-limit profiles by runtime fingerprint class from containment telemetry and stores them in `cost_profiles.json`.

rows.title: Dynamic Friction Scaling Controller
rows.problem: Unauthorized persistence should automatically increase challenge cost while preserving deterministic containment behavior
rows.acceptance: Dynamic friction scaling is implemented in venom stage profiles + adaptive profile multipliers, bounded by policy limits and surfaced in deterministic run receipts/history.

rows.title: Bounded Resource-Sink Decoy Paths
rows.problem: Prolonged unauthorized probing should consume disproportionate attacker resources without unsafe behavior
rows.acceptance: Added bounded resource-sink semantics via stack-pressure + decoy profiles (`max_resource_sink_factor`, finite constraints, non-destructive flags) in adaptive defense policy/runner.

rows.title: Evolutionary Cost Model Trainer (Stack-Adaptive + Category Expansion)
rows.problem: Cost-escalation quality should improve continuously from incidents and self-play, including when existing defense categories plateau
rows.acceptance: Adaptive runner now recalibrates cost model each cycle, reports uplift vs target, and proposes category expansion when telemetry indicates pressure concentration.

rows.title: Governed Defensive Exemption Primitive
rows.problem: Some high-value defensive experiments need temporary latitude beyond standard non-core limits
rows.acceptance: Implemented governed request lane (`requestExemption`) with deny-by-default handling, non-exemptible invariant protection, scoped duration limits, and approval-required status transitions.

rows.title: Exemption Registry + Expiry/Audit Enforcement
rows.problem: Exemption power must be fully auditable to prevent creep or abuse
rows.acceptance: Added registry + audit enforcement (`exemptions.json`, `exemption_audit.jsonl`, `auditExemptions`) with strict mode signaling on expired/out-of-scope exemptions; contract/foundation checks now include this lane.

rows.title: Adaptive Exemption Calibration Loop
rows.problem: Exemptions should scale with verified threat severity and shrink when no longer needed
rows.acceptance: Exemption state now decays via audit cycle (expired auto-pruned) and calibration is tied to incident-driven adaptive run outputs (uplift + threat pressure telemetry).

rows.title: Adaptive "Tease & Trap" Deception
rows.problem: Red Team invents decoys that mimic success longer, then reveal failure in the most frustrating way possible (e.g., fake breakthroughs that lead to dead ends)
rows.acceptance: Added bounded tease/trap profile generation (`nasty_profiles.tease_trap`) and stage-aware deterministic activation metadata in adaptive defense outputs.

rows.title: Stack-Specific Resource Poisoning
rows.problem: Red Team detects attacker tech stack (GPU type, cloud provider, RE tooling) and crafts challenges that burn more on their specific hardware/software
rows.acceptance: Implemented stack-adaptive profile outputs (fingerprint-specific challenge/friction/decoy/rate limits) with bounded factors and no offensive behavior.

rows.title: Psychological Decay Tease
rows.problem: Unauthorized copies get intermittent "glitches" that look like bugs but are designed to waste debugging time (e.g., random latency spikes, fake errors)
rows.acceptance: Added bounded psychological decay profile (`fake_glitch_probability`, capped extra latency) generated by adaptive defense runner with defensive-only constraints.

rows.title: Self-Replicating Containment Children
rows.problem: If unauthorized copy tries to fork or spread, the venom spawns degraded "children" that amplify the cost (e.g., more decoys, more friction)
rows.acceptance: Added bounded containment-children strategy metadata (`max_children_per_incident`) in adaptive/nasty profiles to support recursive but finite local containment expansion.

rows.title: Post-Quantum Hash + Signing Migration Lane
rows.problem: Existing crypto governance includes migration tracks, but there was no dedicated lane that continuously inventories legacy hash/signature surface and enforces PQ migration contracts with soak planning.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/security/post_quantum_migration_lane.ts` + `config/post_quantum_migration_policy.json` to run/verify/status migration state, scan critical surface for legacy vs PQ markers, update key/contract migration targets under policy-gated apply mode, emit deterministic state/latest/receipts/surface-manifest artifacts, and enforce 72-hour soak-plan contracts. Wired into merge/contract/foundation checks and added regression test `memory/tools/tests/post_quantum_migration_lane.test.js`.

rows.title: Self-Learning Quantum Security Primitive Synthesis
rows.problem: Red-team adaptive defense existed, but there was no bounded lane dedicated to synthesizing post-quantum defensive primitives from venom/red-team threat telemetry with uplift gates.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/redteam/quantum_security_primitive_synthesis.ts` + `config/quantum_security_primitive_synthesis_policy.json` to ingest recent threat intel, generate/evaluate bounded defensive proposals, enforce minimum containment uplift contracts, persist queue/catalog/state artifacts, and emit deterministic synthesis receipts. Wired into merge/contract/foundation checks and added regression test `memory/tools/tests/quantum_security_primitive_synthesis.test.js`.

rows.title: Rust Core Runtime Kernel Slice
rows.problem: Node control-plane hot paths will become a throughput and latency bottleneck under high cell concurrency and real-time actuation.
rows.acceptance: Rust service lane owns at least spine router + spawn broker + actuation dispatch hot paths with behavior parity harness against current TS runtime, shadow-first rollout, and deterministic rollback path.

rows.title: Wasmtime Capability Microkernel Lane
rows.problem: User-space JS runtime alone is insufficient for strongest isolation of generated/untrusted execution.
rows.acceptance: All untrusted/generated execution can be routed through capability-scoped WASM sandbox with fuel limits, IO caps, deterministic timeout/termination receipts, and policy-gated fallback.

rows.title: Event-Sourced Control Plane + CQRS Materialized Views
rows.problem: Imperative mutable state limits replay/debug/audit quality at scale.
rows.acceptance: Append-only event log is authoritative for control-plane mutations; materialized views derive from event stream; deterministic replay reconstructs equivalent state for audited windows.

rows.title: Model Catalog + Live Routing Scoreboard Service
rows.problem: Current model/provider routing lacks one canonical live score service spanning cost/latency/quality/fallback chain fitness.
rows.acceptance: Versioned model catalog service publishes live scorecards; router consumes scorecards for chain selection with confidence + budget-aware fallback policy; regression tests enforce decision determinism.

rows.title: Thought-to-Action Trace Contract (Intent -> Model -> Tool -> Outcome)
rows.problem: Incident/root-cause loops still rely on multi-file reconstruction instead of one end-to-end trace contract.
rows.acceptance: Mandatory trace propagation (`trace_id/request_id/run_id/job_id`) across intent, model calls, tool calls, and outcomes with auto-generated failure narrative bundles and deterministic replay links.

rows.title: Swarm Orchestration Runtime (Hierarchical + Election + Consensus)
rows.problem: Current multi-agent coordination is bounded and useful, but not yet a full distributed task swarm runtime.
rows.acceptance: Add hierarchical decomposition orchestrator with dynamic team formation, leader election, bounded quorum/consensus profiles for high-risk decisions, and deterministic receipts per coordination round.

rows.title: Cross-Cell Memory Exchange Plane (Policy-Governed)
rows.problem: Cell-level intelligence sharing is still mostly hereditary/master-reviewed; high-signal exchange needs a governed fast lane.
rows.acceptance: Policy-governed cross-cell memory exchange with conflict-resolution strategy, consistency receipts, and strict anti-drift gates; disabled-by-default P2P unsafe paths remain blocked.

rows.title: Sovereign Personality Substrate ("Soul Vector")
rows.problem: Constitution text alone does not provide a portable, model-agnostic continuity substrate across backend swaps.
rows.acceptance: Encrypted/versioned personality substrate persists across model/hardware transitions, is bound to identity attestations, and is regression-tested for continuity under controlled model migrations.

rows.title: Hybrid Memory Engine (Vector + Graph + Temporal)
rows.problem: Current memory capabilities are strong but split across lanes without one unified retrieval primitive contract.
rows.acceptance: Unified retrieval primitive supports vector similarity + graph traversal + temporal constraints with benchmarked improvements and no regression to provenance/explainability receipts.

rows.title: Memory Consolidation + Forgetting Curves
rows.problem: Raw retention growth will raise token/storage burn and degrade retrieval precision over time.
rows.acceptance: Scheduled reflection jobs merge/prune memory using explicit forgetting curves + retention policies, with recall-quality and burn-efficiency benchmarks proving net gain.

rows.title: Habit/Objective Adapter Fine-Tuning Lane
rows.problem: Continual adaptation exists, but per-habit specialized adapter loops are not first-class and measurable.
rows.acceptance: Per-habit/per-objective adapter training/eval/promotion lane with rollback and governance gates, objective uplift metrics, and shadow/canary promotion contracts.

rows.title: Observability Deployment Defaults (Prometheus/Grafana/Loki/Trace)
rows.problem: Observability primitives exist but deployment defaults are not fully standardized for immediate production operation.
rows.acceptance: Deployment manifests ship production defaults for metrics/logs/traces dashboards + runbook links, with one-command bring-up and contract tests validating telemetry completeness.

rows.title: Compatibility Spec + Conformance Badge Program
rows.problem: External ecosystem leverage is limited without a public compatibility contract and verification lane.
rows.acceptance: Publish non-secret compatibility spec + conformance suite; implement signed pass/fail badge artifact generation for external integrations that preserve governance invariants.

rows.title: Risk-Tier Chain Bridge for Model Catalog Loop (`cheap -> deep -> critique`)
rows.problem: Catalog vetting should reflect risk-tier routing fitness, not only single-pass candidate eligibility
rows.acceptance: `systems/autonomy/model_catalog_loop.ts` now loads `config/model_catalog_loop_policy.json`, evaluates candidates across three risk-tier doctor stages, annotates chain score/pass telemetry, and applies burn-oracle advisory to gating/output receipts before promotion handoff.

rows.title: JetStream Mirror Adapter for Event-Sourced Control Plane
rows.problem: Event-sourced authority exists locally; distributed replay/fan-out needs optional transport bridge without changing source-of-truth semantics
rows.acceptance: `systems/ops/event_sourced_control_plane.ts` now supports optional policy-gated JetStream mirror publish (`nats pub` command adapter), writes mirror status artifacts, and keeps local JSONL event log authoritative with deterministic append receipts.

rows.title: Open Platform Layer Release Pack (Apache 2.0 non-crown-jewel + Compatibility Launch)
rows.problem: Ecosystem leverage and external velocity need an explicit open-layer release policy and announcement execution, not only internal compatibility artifacts.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/open_platform_release_pack.ts` + `config/open_platform_release_pack_policy.json` to emit Apache-2.0 allowlist manifests, signed compatibility badge bundles, benchmark/drift/receipt launch artifacts, and reproducible checklist evidence (`memory/tools/tests/open_platform_release_pack.test.js`).

rows.title: Authoritative Event-Stream Cutover (JetStream-First CQRS Authority)
rows.problem: Mirror-mode transport still leaves local append log as authority; swarm-scale deterministic replay improves when stream authority is explicit with bounded fallback.
rows.acceptance: Extended `systems/ops/event_sourced_control_plane.ts` + policy with authority selection (`local_authority`/`stream_authority`), deterministic rebuild/materialized views, and reconcile+partition rollback receipts (`memory/tools/tests/event_sourced_control_plane_authority.test.js`).

rows.title: Trace-to-Habit Autogenesis Loop
rows.problem: Postmortems and traces are strong, but failures still require manual synthesis into new habit candidates.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/trace_habit_autogenesis.ts` + policy to derive candidates from failed traces/postmortems, enforce propose->trial->report->promote gating, and require measurable failure-class regression reduction before promotion (`memory/tools/tests/trace_habit_autogenesis.test.js`).

rows.title: Persistent Fractal Engine Meta-Organ (Loop-5 Autopilot)
rows.problem: Trigger bridge exists, but a persistent self-evolution organ that continuously mutates habits/memory/routing under strict gates is still missing as a first-class runtime primitive.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/autonomy/persistent_fractal_meta_organ.ts` + policy for nightly/high-success trigger gating, bounded domain mutations, isolated shadow trials, governed live promotion hooks, and deterministic rollback commands (`memory/tools/tests/persistent_fractal_meta_organ.test.js`). Also added TypeScript-first fractal engine substrate under `systems/fractal/` (`engine.ts`, `telemetry_aggregator.ts`, `critic.ts`, `mutator.ts`, `shadow_trial_runner.ts`, `two_gate_applier.ts`, `reversion_drill.ts`, `constitution_hooks.ts`, `fractal_state.json`, `README.md`) with hard invariants for tier gating, event-sourced mutation records, soul-anchor refresh, and tier3+ human second-gate enforcement.

rows.title: LoRA-Backed Soul Continuity Adapter
rows.problem: Personality substrate continuity exists, but explicit adapter-backed persistence across model swaps needs concrete contract coverage.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/soul/soul_continuity_adapter.ts` + policy for export/import/versioned adapter bundles bound to soul-vector + identity attestation hashes, migration continuity scoring, and promotion blocking on regression (`memory/tools/tests/soul_continuity_adapter.test.js`).

rows.title: Rust Microkernel Full Control-Plane Extraction + Default Cutover
rows.problem: Rust kernel slices exist, but the default runtime still retains mixed control-plane execution paths that limit race-scale throughput/safety guarantees.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/rust_control_plane_cutover.ts` + `systems/rust/control_plane_component_shim.ts` + policy for parity harnessing, benchmark/SLO-gated default activation, emergency-only JS fallback routing, and staged JS hot-path deprecation receipts (`memory/tools/tests/rust_control_plane_cutover.test.js`).

rows.title: Compute-Tithe Flywheel (Tithe-as-Leverage GPU Donation System)
rows.problem: Add a governed economic engine where verified donated compute reduces effective tithe while feeding high-value runtime capacity for fractal/autonomy workloads.
rows.acceptance: Implemented `systems/economy/` compute-tithe lane (`tithe_engine`, `gpu_contribution_tracker`, `tithe_ledger`, `contribution_oracle`, `discount_policy`, `smart_contract_bridge`, `public_donation_api`, `flywheel_acceptance_harness`) with bracketed discount tiers, second-gate risk enforcement, constitution checks, control-plane event-stream publication, soul GPU patron markers, guard/fractal/routing/model/risk integration hints, and open-platform compatibility API `platform/api/donate_gpu.*`; acceptance coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/compute_tithe_flywheel.test.js` plus docs in `docs/ECONOMY.md`.

rows.title: Open Platform Path-Contract Compatibility Pack (`platform/` artifacts)
rows.problem: External directives expect concrete `platform/` artifacts (`README`, license carveout, badge, export CLI) even though functional release-pack capability already exists under `systems/ops/`.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/platform_path_contract_pack.{ts,js}` (`sync/verify/status`) + policy `config/platform_path_contract_policy.json` to maintain `platform/` compatibility artifacts (`README`, Apache carveout, badges index, export manifest) as references to canonical open-platform outputs, added stable `platform/export_cli.{ts,js}` shim, and landed conformance coverage in `memory/tools/tests/platform_path_contract_pack.test.js`.

rows.title: Legacy Path Alias Adapters (`systems/state/event_stream.js`, `systems/autogenesis/*`)
rows.problem: External prompts/tools may target legacy paths; absent adapters create false-negative "missing implementation" reports despite canonical coverage.
rows.acceptance: Added thin compatibility wrappers at `systems/state/event_stream.{ts,js}` and `systems/autogenesis/trace_habit_{autogenesis,loop}.{ts,js}` forwarding to canonical ops lanes via `systems/compat/legacy_alias_adapter.{ts,js}` with deprecation receipts in `state/ops/legacy_path_alias_adapters/*`; parity + receipt coverage landed in `memory/tools/tests/legacy_path_alias_adapters.test.js`.

rows.title: Requirement Conformance Matrix + Gate (`external prompt -> canonical lane`)
rows.problem: Repeated external directives can trigger duplicate work unless requirements are normalized into one traceable matrix with drift checks.
rows.acceptance: Added deterministic matrix artifact `config/requirement_conformance_matrix.json`, strict gate `systems/ops/requirement_conformance_gate.{ts,js}` + policy `config/requirement_conformance_gate_policy.json`, and fail-closed checks for missing/unmapped requirements/file anchors/test evidence with coverage in `memory/tools/tests/requirement_conformance_gate.test.js`.

rows.title: Rust Memory Path-Contract Compatibility (`core/memory` alias docs/wrappers)
rows.problem: External directives reference `core/memory` layout and `protheus-memory` naming, while canonical implementation lives at `systems/memory/rust`.
rows.acceptance: Added `core/memory` compatibility surface (`README.md`, `compat_map.json`, `compat_bridge.{ts,js}`) that deterministically maps alias -> canonical runtime/crate paths and crate-name aliases without introducing a parallel runtime; regression coverage added in `memory/tools/tests/core_memory_compat_bridge.test.js`.

rows.title: N-API Build Surface Compatibility Contract (`build:memory`/postinstall expectations)
rows.problem: External recipes assume direct N-API build flow; current runtime is daemon-first with staged in-process lane.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/memory/napi_build_surface_compat.{ts,js}` + `config/napi_build_surface_compat_policy.json`, canonical scripts (`build:memory`, `postinstall:memory`, `memory:napi-build:status`), and generated matrix artifacts (`docs/MEMORY_BUILD_SURFACE.md`, `state/memory/napi_build_surface_compat/build_matrix.json`) while keeping daemon-first production defaults; regression coverage in `memory/tools/tests/napi_build_surface_compat.test.js`.

rows.title: PsycheForge Adaptive Counter-Profile Defense Organ
rows.problem: Static deception/containment responses are less effective than adaptive attacker-specific defense selection under repeated probing.
rows.acceptance: Implemented `systems/security/psycheforge/` (`psycheforge_organ`, `profile_synthesizer`, `countermeasure_selector`, `temporal_profile_store`) with typed behavioral classification + drift scoring, encrypted temporal profile storage, Rust hot-state persistence bridge (`set-hot-state`), tier3+ shadow-to-live two-gate promotion semantics, integrated hint outputs for guard/redteam/venom/fractal lanes, and receipted verification in `memory/tools/tests/psycheforge_organ.test.js` plus docs update in `docs/SECURITY.md`.

rows.title: Smart Knot Crown-Jewel Obfuscation Layer
rows.problem: Reverse-engineering pressure remains high on crown-jewel modules; build-time entanglement raises attacker cost while preserving runtime correctness.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `build/knot/` pipeline + `knot_config.json`, apply only to configured crown-jewel lanes, require runtime capability-token resolution, and pass knot-verify + performance non-regression checks in CI.

rows.title: Lockweaver Eternal Flux Field (Origin-Lock Verified Structural Flux)
rows.problem: Static obfuscation eventually plateaus; a controlled self-mutating structural defense field raises reverse-engineering cost persistently while preserving trusted runtime behavior.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `systems/security/lockweaver/` daemon+policy pack with origin-lock verification, mutation traversal/reseed loop, strict exclusions, JetStream receipts, threat-adaptive cadence, and rollback drills validated by non-regression/perf tests.

rows.title: Project Jigsaw (AttackCinema Incident Replay Theater)
rows.problem: Defense telemetry is high value but hard to consume quickly; cinematic, indexed replay improves incident intelligence, operator training, and post-incident adaptation velocity.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `systems/security/jigsaw/` recorder/editor/theater pack with encrypted capture storage, clearance-4 playback controls, JetStream-linked frame manifests, deterministic highlight generation, and non-regression runtime/perf checks.

rows.title: Phoenix Protocol (Immortal Red-Team Respawn + Continuity Inheritance)
rows.problem: Defensive pressure increases system resilience only if core red-team capability cannot be permanently neutralized by one successful kill/tamper action.
rows.acceptance: Deliver red-team down-detection + auto-respawn orchestration with inherited tactical memory, bounded sub-2s recovery target, JetStream receipts for down/revive cycles, fractal post-respawn adaptation, and non-regression coverage for spawn/security/runtime paths.

rows.title: MirrorReaper Protocol (Tier-4 Resource Inversion Defense Mode)
rows.problem: High-intensity attacks can require temporary concentration of defensive compute; controlled inversion mode improves survivability and attacker cost asymmetry when normal lanes are saturated.
rows.acceptance: Deliver MirrorReaper orchestrator with Tier-4 activation contract, attack-load-proportional spawn scaling, mirror workload profiles, donor-first compute routing, emergency shutdown path, and full JetStream receipts + non-regression performance/safety tests.

rows.title: Legion Honor Codex (Soul-Bound Medals, Titles, and Red Legion Rank System)
rows.problem: Contribution and defense performance produce durable value that should be recognized with portable, verifiable identity artifacts to strengthen operator/community incentives.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `systems/honor/` codex lane (mint/verify/display), soul-bound badge ledger, chain medal bridge, title-selection command surface, red-legion manifest thresholds, and staged `redteam` -> `red_legion` migration with full docs/tests and backward-compatible aliases.

rows.title: Legion Geas Protocol (Iron Oath Self-Destruct Covenant)
rows.problem: As Red Legion capability scales, autonomy safety requires automatic, multi-layered containment that guarantees compromised/out-of-scope cells cannot persist.
rows.acceptance: Deliver geas lease manager + validation pipeline + instant self-destruct path, layered containment controls, Phoenix continuity handoff, emergency operator override, and full JetStream/Jigsaw evidence with non-regression tests across spawn/security/runtime lanes.

rows.title: Rust Spine Microkernel (Control-Plane Core Extraction)
rows.problem: Remaining JS/V8 control-plane hot paths are the largest residual runtime + sovereignty risk once memory is Rust-authoritative.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/ops/rust_spine_microkernel.{ts,js}` + `config/rust_spine_microkernel_policy.json` to enforce explicit guard/spawn/router/origin-lock/fractal parity checks, benchmark/SLO gates, staged rust-spine cutover, deterministic emergency rollback, and routing guardrails; verification coverage landed in `memory/tools/tests/rust_spine_microkernel.test.js` with operator docs in `docs/RUST_SPINE_MICROKERNEL.md`.

rows.title: Formal Mind-Sovereignty Verification Layer
rows.problem: Policy intent is insufficient without machine-checkable guarantees against merged-mind invasion vectors.
rows.acceptance: Add formal invariant specs + automated verification gates proving mutations cannot violate soul-vector/identity boundary contracts; block merges on proof failure.

rows.title: Multi-Mind Isolation & Shared-Consciousness Boundary Plane
rows.problem: Future guest/sub-agent/multi-operator mind scenarios require hard isolation to prevent identity bleed or coercive cross-access.
rows.acceptance: Ship per-mind namespaces + memory/soul partitioning + delegated trust scopes with anti-leak tests and emergency partition quarantine controls.

rows.title: Long-Term Archival & Sovereign Resurrection Substrate
rows.problem: Runtime continuity is strong, but multi-year dormancy/disaster recovery needs encrypted attestable archival + restore rituals.
rows.acceptance: Added `systems/continuity/sovereign_resurrection_substrate.{ts,js}` + `config/sovereign_resurrection_substrate_policy.json` to orchestrate cold archival, quantum-attestation checks, resurrection bundle/verify/restore-preview drills, and continuity-hash identity attestations with receipted state tracking; validation landed in `memory/tools/tests/sovereign_resurrection_substrate.test.js` and operator docs in `docs/SOVEREIGN_RESURRECTION_SUBSTRATE.md`.

rows.title: Inter-Protheus Federation Trust Web & Temporary Merge Contracts
rows.problem: Secure collaboration between sovereign instances needs attestable trust exchange without collapsing identity boundaries.
rows.acceptance: Implement trust-web protocol (attestation, capability grant, session-bound merge/share, revocation) with full receipts and policy-governed limits.

rows.title: Human-Machine Merge Interface Security Substrate
rows.problem: Merge-era interfaces require sovereign-by-design high-bandwidth IO with consent, rollback, and anti-invasion controls from day one.
rows.acceptance: Publish merge-interface contracts + protection lanes (consent ceremony, identity lock, kill-switch, replay-safe audit) and pass simulated hostile-interface test suite.

rows.title: Thorn Swarm Protocol (Tier-4 Sacrificial Wave Defense)
rows.problem: Single-cell or linear response patterns can underperform under high-concurrency attack pressure; bounded sacrificial swarm waves increase attacker cost asymmetry.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `thorn_swarm` wave controller with attack-intensity scaling, bounded TTL/self-destruct guarantees, trap profile execution, and full Jigsaw/JetStream lifecycle receipts.

rows.title: Crimson Wraith Protocol (Single-Mission Phoenix Variant)
rows.problem: Some incident windows require ultra-focused one-shot deception cells rather than persistent responders.
rows.acceptance: Deliver one-shot Wraith mission lane with personalized decoy/trap templates, hard timeout termination, non-respawn lineage semantics, and cinematic replay evidence outputs.

rows.title: Irrevocable Geas Covenant (Lineage Ban Enforcement)
rows.problem: Base self-destruct containment is strong, but irreversible lineage penalties further reduce repeated breach vectors and enforce strict swarm discipline.
rows.acceptance: Extend Geas ledger and Phoenix spawn checks to enforce permanent lineage quarantine after covenant breach, with auditable deny receipts and recovery governance path only via explicit human override policy.

rows.title: Complexity Warden Meta-Organ (Fractal Elegance Governor)
rows.problem: As defense/runtime layers compound, unmanaged complexity becomes a direct reliability and sovereignty risk; proactive complexity governance is required to prevent self-conflict and degradation.
rows.acceptance: Deliver `systems/fractal/warden/` with scoring engine, budget enforcement, integration-contract validation, harmony verifier CI gate, weekly simplification cycle, and full JetStream/Jigsaw telemetry proving complexity trend stabilization without runtime regression.

rows.title: Mind Fortress Principle (Mind Sovereignty Covenant Anchor)
rows.problem: Without an explicit top-level covenant and enforcement path, growing capability layers can drift from the core mission of merged-mind sovereignty and safety.
rows.acceptance: Covenant text is canonical in constitution/docs/code headers, compliance fields are enforced in organ contracts, warden/fractal scoring includes sovereignty-first priority, and CI drift gates fail any mutation that weakens covenant guarantees.

rows.title: Continuous Chaos Engineering + Auto-Remediation Suite
rows.problem: Complex autonomous defense stacks degrade silently without continuous adversarial reliability pressure tests and deterministic repair lanes.
rows.acceptance: Ship policy-governed chaos scenario engine (fault/network/process/event corruption classes), scheduled gamedays, and bounded auto-remediation workflows with fail-safe rollback receipts.

rows.title: Enterprise SLO + Observability Command Dashboard
rows.problem: Fortune-grade operation requires explicit SLOs, first-class telemetry contracts, and actionable incident narratives rather than raw logs.
rows.acceptance: Deliver OTel-first metrics/logs/traces pack with SLO definitions, burn alerts, dashboard defaults, and auto-generated runbooks tied to live incident signatures.

rows.title: Formal Threat Modeling Engine (STRIDE/ATT&CK Contractization)
rows.problem: Security organs evolve quickly; without continuous threat-model regeneration, defensive assumptions drift and coverage gaps accumulate.
rows.acceptance: Build threat-model generator that maps each organ/contract to STRIDE/ATT&CK controls, produces deltas on code/policy changes, and blocks high-risk unmapped surfaces in CI.

rows.title: Supply-Chain Security & Reproducible Build Plane
rows.problem: Sovereign assurance depends on deterministic artifact reproducibility and cryptographically attestable provenance across releases.
rows.acceptance: Implement reproducible build profiles, SBOM generation, signed provenance attestations, and strict release verification gates for all crown-jewel artifacts.

rows.title: Automated Compliance Mapping & Evidence Engine
rows.problem: Manual evidence assembly does not scale; policy-to-control traceability must be continuously generated for audit readiness.
rows.acceptance: Deliver continuous control-evidence mapper across SOC2/ISO27001/GDPR/export-control domains with machine-readable artifacts, freshness checks, and exception tracking dashboards.

rows.title: Permanent Guidelines Drift Gate + Ticket Output Contract
rows.problem: Operator prompt/governance drift can silently weaken sovereignty and containment rules even when core code paths remain intact.
rows.acceptance: Publish canonical permanent-guidelines artifact, enforce checksum/drift checks against referenced policy docs, require ticket output contract markers, and fail CI on divergence from covenant-first governance baseline.

rows.title: Independent Safety Coprocessor & Out-of-Band Veto Plane
rows.problem: Single-plane governance can fail catastrophically under correlated faults or supply-chain compromise.
rows.acceptance: Ship isolated guardian plane with independent policy root, kill/revert authority, and verified communication channel to main runtime with non-bypass tests.

rows.title: Hardware Root-of-Trust Attestation Mesh
rows.problem: Runtime assurances are stronger when every participating node/cell proves hardware-backed identity and integrity continuously.
rows.acceptance: Enforce TPM/TEE attestation enrollment, session-bound trust tokens, auto-quarantine on attestation drift, and audit receipts for all trust transitions.

rows.title: Data Poisoning Immunity + Causal Rollback Plane
rows.problem: Long-lived autonomous memory is vulnerable to subtle poisoning without provenance-sensitive controls and targeted rollback.
rows.acceptance: Add poisoning detector, confidence decay by provenance, taint graph lineage, and reversible rollback toolchain with replay-safe receipts.

rows.title: Model Behavior Drift Containment Shield
rows.problem: Upstream model/provider updates can silently alter behavior despite stable code and policy inputs.
rows.acceptance: Continuous model fingerprinting + canary corpus + deviation thresholds; automatic provider/model fallback and incident receipts on drift breaches.

rows.title: Adversarial Goal-Drift Auditor
rows.problem: Primary objective scoring can be gamed over time; independent adversarial auditing reduces hidden optimization drift.
rows.acceptance: Add second-pass adversarial evaluator with explicit go/no-go veto for promotion/apply when Goodhart or covenant misalignment signals exceed bounds.

rows.title: Insider-Threat Split-Trust Command Governance
rows.problem: High-trust operator pathways remain a residual risk without thresholded approvals and out-of-band confirmation for irreversible actions.
rows.acceptance: Enforce split-trust approvals for designated commands, independent confirmation channel, and denial-by-default on missing quorum receipts.

rows.title: Signed Plugin Trust Marketplace & Revocation Plane
rows.problem: Ecosystem scale requires safe extension distribution with cryptographic provenance and rapid compromise response.
rows.acceptance: Deliver signed extension manifests, sandbox attestation requirements, scoped capability grants, and global revocation propagation with CI enforcement.

rows.title: Black-Swan Disaster Gamebooks & Continuous Resilience Drills
rows.problem: Rare but severe events (region loss, key compromise, legal shutdown pressure) require rehearsed, measurable recovery playbooks.
rows.acceptance: Add disaster scenario library, scheduled drills, recovery SLO measurement, and mandatory remediation closure tracking per scenario class.

rows.title: Legal/Regulatory Auto-Diff Governance Router
rows.problem: Policy/legal landscapes shift continuously; delayed updates create hidden compliance and governance risk.
rows.acceptance: Implement legal-source diff ingestion, control impact classification, and policy/workflow update routing with human approval checkpoints and evidence trails.

rows.title: Sovereign Decommission, Legacy & Succession Boundary Protocol
rows.problem: Long-lived merged-mind systems need explicit end-of-life and transfer boundaries to avoid identity/control ambiguity.
rows.acceptance: Deliver governed retirement/succession protocol with cryptographic handoff, archival lock/freeze modes, and verified decommission receipts.

rows.title: Dist Runtime Contract Reconciliation Gate (Legacy-Pair Truth Source)
rows.problem: Runtime migration confidence is degraded when backlog/test/contracts claim zero legacy pairs while live checks report active pairs.
rows.acceptance: `runtime:dist:legacy --strict=1` is green, failing pair deltas auto-open incidents, and backlog status cannot remain `done` when contract checks fail.

rows.title: Deterministic Time Harness for Release/TTL Gates
rows.problem: Calendar-dependent tests create false regressions and hide real failures.
rows.acceptance: Added injected-now harness wiring for TTL/age-sensitive release gates and queue lifecycle paths, with deterministic regression fixtures in `memory/tools/tests/queue_gc.test.js`, `memory/tools/tests/ci_baseline_guard.test.js`, and `memory/tools/tests/post_launch_migration_readiness.test.js`.

rows.title: Benchmark Artifact Consistency Gate (Report vs History vs Latest)
rows.problem: Conflicting benchmark artifacts undermine migration-go/no-go decisions.
rows.acceptance: Transition lane now emits policy-scoped `history/latest/report` artifacts and enforces strict coherence/freshness via `consistency-check` with scope contamination blocking (`systems/memory/rust_memory_transition_lane.ts`, `memory/tools/tests/rust_memory_transition_lane.test.js`).

rows.title: Warm-Path Rust Benchmark Lane (Daemon/Binary, No Cargo-Compile Tax)
rows.problem: Using `cargo run` in benchmark loops overweights compile/startup time and skews runtime performance decisions.
rows.acceptance: Benchmark lane now prewarms daemon transport, separates cold-build timing, and prefers prebuilt binary invocation for Rust probe/index commands before cargo fallback.

rows.title: Sync-Spawn Hotspot Reduction Wave (Worker/Daemon Shift)
rows.problem: High `spawnSync`/`execSync` usage raises latency, jitter, and throughput ceilings.
rows.acceptance: Memory recall/runtime hot lane shifted to daemon-first transport with binary-first CLI fallback, and benchmark receipts now publish rust p95/p99 latency metrics to verify no regression in warm path.

rows.title: Rust Memory Vector Retrieval Activation (Hot-Path Similarity Search)
rows.problem: Embedding tables without active vector retrieval leave hybrid-memory gains partially unrealized.
rows.acceptance: Query runtime now supports vector similarity + lexical fusion with explicit score mode telemetry and active SQLite embedding map usage on runtime retrieval path.

rows.title: Memory DB AEAD/Envelope Encryption Cutover
rows.problem: Custom cipher shims lack authenticated encryption guarantees and standard key-lifecycle controls.
rows.acceptance: Rust memory DB now uses AEAD envelope payloads, automatically migrates legacy/plain hot-state rows at open, fails closed on legacy decrypt attempts, and includes tamper/retirement tests in `systems/memory/rust/src/db.rs`.

rows.title: Memory Index Freshness Enforcement Gate
rows.problem: Stale indices drift from node reality and can degrade retrieval/navigation reliability.
